en.text: O slayer of the Keśi demon
One with the wisdom of detachment
not seeking the truth – without spiritual or scriptural conception
nor to one who is averse to My service
living beings (considering My superior potency to be in everything)
of the brāhmaṇ, kṣatriya, and vaiśya
in dedicating your intelligence to Me
endeavours or functions of the vital airs
Arjuna with bow in hand, the winner of wealth
absorbed in meditation on the Supreme Lord
through determination of the nature of goodness
to the peripheral only, such as the body
according to the three modes of material nature
according to the qualities of goodness, passion, and ignorance
according to the modes of nature
and always subject to joy and sorrow
senses – eyes, ears, etc., as the instrument
desirer of the fruits of action
(2) the ‘doer’, the ego of the knot of spirit and matter
out of fear of physical discomfort
in the conclusive knowledge of action
the functions of the mind, life forces, and senses
keeping Me as the supreme objective
is not attached to the fruits of actions
nor is he bound by action
Born of sleep, laziness, and illusion
the higher state, of transcending all duties
of service to the brāhmaṇs, kṣatriyas, and vaiśyas
and one’s capability of performing it
by the performers of virtuous acts
attachment and aversion – likes and dislikes
happiness of the nature of passion
a worker of the nature of passion
is of the nature of passion
intelligence of the nature of passion
has been clearly described (in the scriptures)
by renouncing the fruits of his actions
He causes all beings to revolve (through many existences)
the renunciation of the fruits of all actions, whether daily, incidental, or fruitive
with his body, speech, and mind
absorbed in the nature of goodness
constitute renunciation of the nature of goodness
the person who has achieved the state of transcending all duties
one dedicated to executing his prescribed duty
is determination of the nature of goodness
happiness of the nature of goodness
a worker of the nature of goodness
intelligence of the nature of goodness
by the potency of that devotion
concerning tyāga, detachment, or the quality of renunciation
about the three kinds of happiness
knowledge of the nature of ignorance
a worker of the nature of ignorance
determination of the nature of ignorance
intelligence of the nature of ignorance
within all the diverse living beings
remaining free from the association of materialistic persons
intelligence of the nature of goodness
from the contact of the senses with their objects
By the grace of Śrī Vyāsadev
Duties of sacrifice, charity, and austerity, etc
disciplining the body, mind, and speech
one who renounces the fruits of action
and by whom, individually and collectively
the Lord of yoga, the objective of yoga
yoga (yoga of action, knowledge, and devotion)
as far as being the Master of all opulences
theistic mentality or firm faith in the teachings of the scriptures
born of the purity of self-realisation
the Supreme Lord as the Supersoul

ru.text: глубокая вера в слова Господа, священных писаний и духовных наставников
не обладающий связью с миром души и Высшей Души
не способному отказываться от чувственных удовольствий
без понимания истины и цели жизни
те, кто не отрешен от мирских желаний
заставляет вращаться (воплощаясь в высших и низших мирах)
реализованное на опыте, глубокое и разностороннее знание о предмете
Ш́рӣ Кр̣ш̣н̣ы, победителя демона Кеш́и, и Арджуны
в писании, раскрывающем учение о душе и материальных элементах
Господа Хари, освобождающего от всего неблагоприятного
таких, как звук и т. д
